title: Hamro Store
description: A web-based e-commerce platform that enables local producers and artisans to sell their products online, allowing buyers to easily discover and purchase locally available goods while supporting local businesses.
responsibilities: Developed full-stack features for a local product marketplace, including user authentication and role-based access for buyers, producers, and artisans
Implemented product listing, category management, and order processing functionality
Designed and integrated responsive user interfaces using React and modern UI components
Built and connected RESTful APIs using Laravel for seamless frontend–backend communication
Designed and managed MySQL database schemas for products, users, orders, and local sellers
Implemented image upload, storage, and secure access control for product management
features: User authentication and role-based access for buyers, producers, and artisans
Product listing and category management for local goods
Image upload and product gallery management
Seller dashboard for managing products and orders
Secure API-based data exchange between frontend and backend
achievements: This project strengthened my understanding of full-stack development by building a complete local product e-commerce platform from scratch, focusing on real-world workflows and clean system architecture.
